GACERR_EC_BALANCELACK - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.emv.EMVErrorCode
EC Balance not enough
GACERR_EC_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.emv.EMVErrorCode
EC balance < transaction amount + threshold, resulting in online
GACERR_ECHO - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.emv.EMVErrorCode
MCCS GAC apdu without return, need to enter torn transaction
GACERR_ECMAC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.emv.EMVErrorCode
GAC Error in Electronic Cash
GACERR_ECONLY_GOONLINE - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.emv.EMVErrorCode
Pure electronic cash card requires EC online but refuse
